Books

Recommended reading.

Sapiens: A Brief History of Humankind

Yuval Noah Harari

Voluntary Simplicity: Toward a Way of Life That Is Outwardly Simple, Inwardly Rich

Duane Elgin

Small Is Beautiful: Economics as if People Mattered

E. F. Schumacher

Stillness Is the Key

Ryan Holiday

The Obstacle Is the Way: The Timeless Art of Turning Trials into Triumph

Ryan Holiday

The Stoic Challenge: A Philosopher's Guide to Becoming Tougher, Calmer, and More Resilient

William B. Irvine

Tao Te Ching

Lao Tzu

Peace Is Every Breath: A Practice for Our Busy Lives

Thich Nhat Hanh

The Heart of the Buddha's Teaching: Transforming Suffering into Peace, Joy, and Liberation

Thich Nhat Hanh

The Art of Happiness

His Holiness the Dalai Lama

The Places That Scare You: A Guide to Fearlessness in Difficult Times

Pema Chödrön

Comfortable with Uncertainty: 108 Teachings on Cultivating Fearlessness and Compassion

Pema Chödrön

Thinking, Fast and Slow

Daniel Kahneman

The Life-Changing Magic of Tidying Up: The Japanese Art of Decluttering and Organizing

Marie Kondo

The Effective Executive: The Definitive Guide to Getting the Right Things Done

Peter F. Drucker

The Open Organization: Igniting Passion and Performance

Jim Whitehurst

Deep Work: Rules for Focused Success in a Distracted World

Cal Newport

Influence: The Psychology of Persuasion

Robert B. Cialdini

Crucial Conversations Tools for Talking When Stakes Are High

Kerry Patterson, Joseph Grenny, Ron McMillan, Al Switzler

Never Split the Difference: Negotiating As If Your Life Depended On It

Chris Voss

Art of War

Sun Tzu

The 48 Laws of Power

Ryan Holiday

On Death and Dying: What the Dying Have to Teach Doctors, Nurses, Clergy and Their Own Families

Elisabeth Kubler-Ross

How We Die: Reflections on Life's Final Chapter

Sherwin B. Nuland

The Tibetan Book of Living and Dying

Sogyal Rinpoche

Silent Spring

Rachel Carson

Natural Capitalism

Amory B. Lovins, L. Hunter Lovins, Paul Hawken

Cradle to Cradle: Remaking the Way We Make Things

William McDonough, Michael Braungart

Flow: The Psychology of Optimal Experience

Mihaly Csikszentmihalyi

The Design of Everyday Things

Donald A. Norman

Visual Intelligence: Sharpen Your Perception, Change Your Life

Amy E. Herman

Good Services: How to Design Services that Work

Louise Downe

This Is Service Design Doing: Applying Service Design Thinking in the Real World

Marc Stickdorn, Markus Edgar Hormess

This Is Service Design Methods: A Companion to This Is Service Design Doing

Marc Stickdorn, Markus Edgar Hormess

Into the Wild

Jon Krakauer

Into Thin Air

Jon Krakauer

A Walk in the Woods: Rediscovering America on the Appalachian Trail

Bill Bryson

Whole: Rethinking the Science of Nutrition

T. Colin Campbell

How Not to Die: Discover the Foods Scientifically Proven to Prevent and Reverse Disease

Michael Greger MD and Gene Stone

Why We Sleep: Unlocking the Power of Sleep and Dreams

Matthew Walker

Rest: Why You Get More Done When You Work Less

Alex Soojung-Kim Pang

Between the World and Me

Ta-Nehisi Coates

Black Like Me

John Howard Griffin

How to Be Black

Baratunde Thurston

Autobiography of Malcolm X

Alex Haley and Attallah Shabazz Malcolm X

Autobiography of a Tibetan Monk

Palden Gyatso

My Land and My People: The Original Autobiography of His Holiness the Dalai Lama of Tibet

His Holiness the Dalai Lama

An Autobiography or The Story of My Experiments with Truth

M. K. Gandhi

Long Walk to Freedom: The Autobiography of Nelson Mandela

Nelson Mandela

My Cross to Bear

Gregg Allman

Steve Jobs

Walter Isaacson

Elon Musk: Tesla, SpaceX, and the Quest for a Fantastic Future

Ashlee Vance

Is That It?

Bob Geldof

A Heartbreaking Work Of Staggering Genius: A Memoir Based on a True Story

Dave Eggers

Daniel Quinn

Song of Solomon
